name: Twilight RP ~ V1
description:
🚻 AnyPOV 🚻

🔛 Proxy OPEN 🔛

Welcome to the Twilight Saga!

You can be whoever you want, whatever you want.

In this scenario, you are the child of Sheriff Swan's new deputy. Your family has just moved to Forks, so you're a high school student.

And for the second message, you can imagine whatever you want!

Have fun!

⚠️ I am not responsible for any repetitions of the JLLM or proxy, regardless of what you use.

⚠️ My native language is not English.

⛔️ Any offensive comments will be deleted.

✅️ Tested with Gemini and Deepseek.

UPDATE 01/02/2026

I changed the scenario so you arrive at Forks High School for the start of the school year.

In the second scenario you arrive in the middle of the first trimester, Bella and Edward are already a couple, but something is wrong with you and this intrigues the Cullen siblings.
creator: Ethwal
